name: alanchester-brand
description: Brand tokens for Alan Chester. For any ε > 0, there exists a δ > 0.

accent.meaning: Green = the data, the pivot, the δ. The highlight of the story.
do: Apply to ε in equations (the standard the data sets)
Apply to inflection points in charts and timelines
Apply to the 'result' column in any notebook layout
Apply to the noun in body copy that names the finding
dont: Don't decorate eyebrows, page numbers, dividers, or section tags
Don't use it as emphasis on opinions
If a green element doesn't represent data, evidence, or a pivot, demote it to ink

epsilon.comment: ε is exactly 50% of the cap height of A and C, vertically centered.
